reviews.comment:
Entre Lujan (San Luis) y Costa de Araujo (mendoza) es la única estación de servicio.
Precio del combustible normal.

Between Luján (San Luis) and Costa de Araujo (Mendoza), it's the only gas station.
Regular fuel price.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. No hay GNC hasta San Juan.
Tampoco señal de telefono, wifi o gps....los celulares mueren mas de 150km.....una decidia. No es culpa de la estacion!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. There's no CNG until San Juan.
No phone signal, Wi-Fi, or GPS either...cell phones die after 150 km...a real letdown. It's not the station's fault!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtb2JHcHFBRRAB

reviews.comment:

I didn't like it...the prices are outrageous, the bathrooms are shameful...I'll never go back

reviews.comment:
Malísimo, no tenía combustible, NAFTA. YPF deberían de tomar cartas en el tema o tendremos que comprar otras marcas...

(Translated by Google)
Terrible, there was no fuel, no NAFTA. YPF should take action on this issue, or we'll have to buy other brands...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtdXZIU0pnEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
It has space for picnics.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMta3J6UmtBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tiene espacios al aire libre acondicionados (mesas, sillas) para tomar un breve descanso durante el viaje y tomarse unos mates con las exquisitas tortitas a venden. Pocos sanitarios, pero cuidan la limpieza.

(Translated by Google)
It has outdoor seating areas (tables, chairs) for taking a short break during the trip and enjoying some mate with the delicious pastries they sell. There are few restrooms, but they are kept clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtdkszZ3B3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Tenes que llevar reserva de dinero en efectivo para comprar en el buffet. No trabajan con tarjetas ni debitos

(Translated by Google)
You need to bring cash to spend at the buffet. They don't accept cards or debit cards.
